hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath','') or d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && cd /home/paul/projects/pinn && git add "$f" 2>/dev/null && git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null || git commit -m "auto: update $(basename "$f")" 2>/dev/null; } 2>/dev/null || true
